top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percent_double_bond
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR047';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percent_double_bond
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR047';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percent_double_bond
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b USING (molecule_id)
WHERE m.label = 'TR047';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percent_double_bond
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR047';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percent_double_bond
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR047';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percent_double_bond
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b USING (molecule_id)
WHERE m.label = 'TR047';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percent_double_bond
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR047';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percent_double_bond
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR047';
